title: Verify commons-server WS reachability via clung.us

log.context: Verify commons-server WS reachability via clung.us

Here's the full picture:

---

**1. Does clunger proxy `/commons-ws` to commons-server?**

Yes. Clunger has a dedicated WebSocket proxy at `/commons-ws` (around line 2226–2292 of `/mnt/data/clunger/src/index.ts`). On a WebSocket upgrade to `/commons-ws`, it proxies the connection to `ws://localhost:8090/ws`, forwarding all query params (userId, name, color). It's a full bidirectional pipe.

**2. Is commons-server running on port 8090?**

Yes — two PIDs (2976443 and 3004638) are bound to port 809...(truncated)
